title: TLM: True POWER
description: A SlashBlade: Resharped and Touhou Little Maid crossover addon, designed to empower maids in wielding SlashBlades.
body:
# Touhou Little Maid: True POWER (TLM: True POWER)

A SlashBlade: Resharped and Touhou Little Maid crossover addon, designed to empower maids in wielding SlashBlades.

# Prologue

Months ago, Touhou Little Maid introduced basic integration with SlashBlade: Resharped. However, maids could only perform simple swings with the blade, treating it like an ordinary sword.

*Late one night, you overhear your sleeping maid murmuring:*

*"For my master..."*

*"I need power... More POWER..."*

Now, place that blade in your maid's hands once more.

— Unleash the power of SlashBlade within your maid. True POWER.

# Features

This mod introduces a new combat mode: **SlashBlade Attack**. When assigned this task, your maid will engage enemies using SlashBlade techniques. *(Note: The original SlashBlade integration in Touhou Little Maid will be disabled!)*

Craft and equip your maid with an **Unawakened Soul**. As she defeats enemies using the SlashBlade, this soul will transform into various **Souls of Maid**. Each soul enhances her SlashBlade combat prowess in unique ways.

For example:
*   **Soul of Maid - Aerial Rave**: Enables your maid to launch enemies into the air for aerial combos.
*   **Soul of Maid - Shooting Arts**: Grants your maid the ability to strike foes with Summoned Swords.
*   **Soul of Maid - Judgement Cut**: Allows your maid to unleash Judgement Cut upon enemies.
*   ...and many more!

Naturally, you can also forge mightier SlashBlades and entrust them to your maid... And then? Stand alongside her as you confront powerful foes together.

# License  

This mod is open-source under the GPL v3.0 License.

You may include it in your modpacks/servers as long as you **comply with the license terms**.
